g.title: Rectangle.242
g.desc: The AKS cluster uses a private endpoint to connect to the man...
g.text: The AKS cluster uses a private endpoint to connect to the managed API server.

g.title: Rectangle.322
g.desc: This VM runs an Azure DevOps self-hosted agent and contains t...
g.text: This VM runs an Azure DevOps self-hosted agent and contains tools such as Kubectl, the Azure CLI, Docker, and Helm.

g.title: Sheet.1057
g.desc: A CD pipeline deploys a workload to the private AKS cluster b...
g.text: A CD pipeline deploys a workload to the private AKS cluster by using a Helm chart. A developer pull request can trigger pipeline execution.

g.title: Sheet.1058
g.desc: The CD pipeline contains stages and/or jobs that run on an Az...
g.text: The CD pipeline contains stages and/or jobs that run on an Azure DevOps self-hosted agent.

g.title: Sheet.1059
g.desc: The self-hosted agent deployed as a Linux VM is part of the a...
g.text: The self-hosted agent deployed as a Linux VM is part of the agent pool specified in the pipeline. The pipeline is run in this agent.

g.title: Sheet.1060
g.desc: The pipeline uses tools like Helm, Kubectl, and Kustomize to ...
g.text: The pipeline uses tools like Helm, Kubectl, and Kustomize to deploy workloads to the private AKS cluster.

g.title: Sheet.1061
g.desc: The agent nodes of the private AKS cluster and the self-hoste...
g.text: The agent nodes of the private AKS cluster and the self-hosted agent communicate with the API server via a private endpoint.

g.title: Rectangle.181
g.desc: In a private cluster, the control plane or API server has an ...
g.text: In a private cluster, the control plane or API server has an internal IP address.
